entries.definition:
(77:2) فَالْعَاصِفَاتِ عَصْفًا and winds violently storming.
عَاصِف ʿāṣif [quasi-act. part.] stormy (10:22) جَاءَتْهَا رِيحٌ عَاصِفٌ there comes upon them a stormy wind.

عَاصِفَةٌ ʿāṣifatun [fem. quasi-act. part., pl. عَاصِفَات ʿāṣifāt] stormy, stormy [wind]; storm (21:81) وَلِسُلَيْمَانَ الرِّيحَ عَاصِفَةً and for Solomon [We] [harnessed] the stormy wind.
entries.definition_english:
(77:2) فَالْعَاصِفَاتِ عَصْفًا and winds violently storming.
عَاصِف ʿāṣif [quasi-act. part.] stormy (10:22) جَاءَتْهَا رِيحٌ عَاصِفٌ there comes upon them a stormy wind.

عَاصِفَةٌ ʿāṣifatun [fem. quasi-act. part., pl. عَاصِفَات ʿāṣifāt] stormy, stormy [wind]; storm (21:81) وَلِسُلَيْمَانَ الرِّيحَ عَاصِفَةً and for Solomon [We] [harnessed] the stormy wind.
